  Model Context Protocol Discovery Tool v0.0.3

Usage:
  mcp-discover-dotnet <input-directory> <output-directory>

Description:
  Scans .NET assemblies for MCP (Model Context Protocol) metadata
  and generates a structured JSON file with discovered capabilities.

Arguments:
  <input-directory>   Directory containing .dll assemblies to scan
  <output-directory>  Directory where mcp-metadata.json will be written

Options:
  -h, --help         Show this help information
  -m, --markdown     Generate markdown report alongside JSON
  -o, --omit-path    Omit base path from assembly paths in output
  -n, --no-timestamp Omit timestamp from output (for version control)

Examples:
  # Scan build output
  mcp-discover-dotnet ./bin/Release/net10.0 ./metadata

  # Scan current directory
  mcp-discover-dotnet . ./output

  # Generate markdown report
  mcp-discover-dotnet ./bin/Release/net10.0 ./metadata --markdown

What it discovers:
  • Tools      - Methods decorated with [McpServerTool]
  • Resources  - Methods decorated with [McpServerResource]
  • Prompts    - Methods decorated with [McpServerPrompt]

For more information:
  https://github.com/echapmanFromBunnings/mcp.discovery.tool
